Type Property# willEnterForeground

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+watchOS 26.0+

```
static var willEnterForeground: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSExtensionContext.WillEnterForegroundMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSExtensionContext.WillEnterForegroundMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/willenterforeground-p1og#see-also)
